title: Crondex Job
description: One pre-made cron job any AI agent (Claude, Codex, Hermes, OpenClaw, etc.) can pull, adjust, and schedule.

id.description: Unique slug, matches filename without extension.

timezone.description: IANA timezone, e.g. 'America/Los_Angeles'. Defaults to system local time if omitted.

runner.description: 'agent-prompt' hands `prompt` to an LLM agent each run. 'shell' executes `command` directly.

prompt.description: Task text given to the agent. Supports {{variable}} placeholders resolved from `variables`.

command.description: Shell command to run, for runner: shell. Supports {{variable}} placeholders.

variables.description: User-adjustable knobs, keyed by placeholder name.
